company: Florida investor-owned electric utilities (environmental cost recovery)
doc_type: final order on environmental cost recovery
source_note: Florida PSC Order No. PSC-2019-0500-FOF-EI (Final Order), Docket No. 20190007-EI, 'Environmental cost recovery clause', issued November 22, 2019 (11 pp) — the Commission's annual review of the reasonableness of environmental-compliance project costs and the resulting cost-recovery factors for Florida's investor-owned electric utilities (Section 366.8255, Fla. Stat.). Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Florida PSC document clerk, document 11080-2019 (psc.state.fl.us/library/Orders/2019/11080-2019.pdf).

company: Florida investor-owned utilities (energy conservation cost recovery)
doc_type: final order on conservation cost recovery
source_note: Florida PSC Order No. PSC-2023-0342-FOF-EG (Final Order), Docket No. 20230002-EG, 'Energy conservation cost recovery clause', issued November 16, 2023 (9 pp) — the Commission's annual review of energy-conservation / demand-side-management program cost recovery, approving the conservation cost-recovery amounts, tariffs, and factors for January–December 2024 for Florida's investor-owned utilities. Listed for reference (metadata-only). Source: Florida PSC document clerk, document 06084-2023 (psc.state.fl.us/library/Orders/2023/06084-2023.pdf).
